items.definition_en: Basil is a green herb often used in cooking.
items.example_en: She added fresh basil to the pasta.

items.definition_en: Thyme is a small herb used to flavor food.
items.example_en: They put thyme into the soup.

items.definition_en: Cinnamon is a brown spice often used in sweet dishes.
items.example_en: She sprinkled cinnamon on her oatmeal.

items.definition_en: Mint is a green herb with a fresh taste.
items.example_en: He put mint leaves in his drink.

items.definition_en: Dill is a green plant used for flavor in food.
items.example_en: She sprinkled dill on the potatoes.

items.definition_en: Rosemary is a fragrant herb used in cooking.
items.example_en: They used rosemary to season the chicken.

items.definition_en: Parsley is a common green herb added to food.
items.example_en: She garnished the soup with parsley.

items.definition_en: Ginger is a spicy root used in cooking.
items.example_en: Ginger adds flavor to tea and cakes.

items.definition_en: Coriander is a green herb with a strong taste.
items.example_en: Coriander is used in many Asian dishes.

items.definition_en: Paprika is a red spice made from dried peppers.
items.example_en: He added paprika to the stew for color.

items.definition_en: Nutmeg is a spice with a warm, sweet taste.
items.example_en: She put a little nutmeg in the sauce.

items.definition_en: Chili powder is a spicy red powder used in food.
items.example_en: He likes to add chili powder to his beans.

items.definition_en: Oregano is a herb often used in pizza and pasta.
items.example_en: She sprinkled oregano on the pizza.

items.definition_en: Fennel is a plant with seeds and leaves used in food.
items.example_en: Fennel adds a sweet flavor to dishes.

items.definition_en: A clove is a small brown spice used in cooking.
items.example_en: Cloves give a warm taste to baked goods.

items.definition_en: Sage is a herb with grey-green leaves used in food.
items.example_en: She used sage in the stuffing.

items.definition_en: Tarragon is a green herb with a strong flavor.
items.example_en: Tarragon is common in French cooking.

items.definition_en: A bay leaf is a dried leaf put in soups and stews.
items.example_en: She added a bay leaf to the pot.

items.definition_en: Cumin is a spice made from small brown seeds.
items.example_en: Cumin gives a warm taste to curry.

items.definition_en: Cardamom is a spice with a strong, sweet taste.
items.example_en: Cardamom is often used in desserts.
